name: CTO Realty Growth, Inc.
business: CTO Realty Growth, Inc. is a publicly traded, self-managed equity REIT focusing on the ownership, management, and repositioning of high-quality retail and mixed-use properties located primarily in faster-growing, business-friendly markets. The company also generates fee income from managing Alpine Income Property Trust, Inc. (PINE) and has a portfolio of commercial loans and preferred equity investments.

exposures.sentence: Our business plan is primarily focused on investing in shopping centers.
Competition that traditional retail tenants face from e-commerce retail sales, or the integration of brick and mortar stores with e-commerce retail operators, could adversely affect our business.
